title: Agrinio, Western Greece — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Agrinio, Western Greece: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Agrinio is a city in Western Greece with a population of 59,329. Western Greece’s agricultural hub on the Achelous River, with tobacco history and nearby Lake Trichonida.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
